sequences.title: Conference Contact Outreach Sequence
sequences.targetAudience: Credit union executives met at industry events
sequences.approvalNote: Approved by Martha and Shella. A/B versions per email keyed to contact title. Email 2 collaborative invite angle well-received. Timing rationale approved as-is.
sequences.usageNote: Evergreen. Use for any contact made at an in-person or virtual industry event, on an ongoing basis. Not tied to a batch or hypothesis test. Do not use for cold contacts or warm intro referrals.

sequences.title: Cold Outreach — Community Bank VP/EVP (Southeast)
sequences.targetAudience: VP/EVP at community banks, $500M–$1B assets, Southeast & Mid-Atlantic
sequences.usageNote: Angle: invisible attrition — deposit relationships lost when the primary account holder dies. Do not use for event contacts, CDFIs, or institutions over $2B.
